title: Animal Garden - Snow Leopard
description: This mod adds the ghost of the mountains, the snow leopard as a tamable animal into the snowy biomes.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dC08F5P8/images/adbde19d0fa20e3f2b720b70aa6393f798364fa1.gif)

This mod adds the ghost of the mountains, the snow leopard as a tamable animal into the snowy biomes.

They are **carnivorous**, so they need meat or fish items for taming.

 

They are actually shy and will **avoid players** when possible, but will fight back when attacked.

They heal a bit when resting, eating food items from the ground or when fed by hand.

At a **random** time they will go **hunting** if not resting and attack a nearby mob.

They are **crepuscular** so they sleep a lot and is active primarily during dawn and dusk.

Their **eyes glow** in the dark and have 5 color variation(just small differences in them)

And **can climb** blocks like spiders.

When tamed and in following mode they will fight alongside their owner.

Just like in my other animal mods the mobs have 3 type of behavior that can be changed when interaction with them (a message shows up so you know which behavior it is using)

(wandering - resting - following)

 

As mentioned they spawn in the **snowy biomes**.

You can change this and other spawn settings
by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders
or via resource pack,

but in fabric some spawn settings like the weight, min, max have to be edited in the config file.
 

**This mod currently supports:**

**Forge       26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1 | 1.18.2**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.x**

**Fabric      26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**


Credits:
Happy PonyTail
